qa_pairs.question: What kind of simulations are enabled when GROMACS is compiled with CP2K support?
qa_pairs.answer: When GROMACS is compiled with CP2K support, it enables Hybrid Quantum-Classical (QM/MM) simulations.

qa_pairs.question: What do the initials QM/MM stand for when referring to GROMACS simulations with CP2K support?
qa_pairs.answer: In the context of GROMACS simulations with CP2K support, QM/MM stands for Hybrid Quantum-Classical simulations.
